auCDtect: CD records authenticity detector, version 0.8.2
Copyright (c) 2004 Oleg Berngardt. All rights reserved.
Copyright (c) 2004 Alexander Djourik. All rights reserved.

Detect mode (0..40 with 0 = most accurate):  8 (default)


01 Heatseeker.wav:  track looks like CDDA with probability 100%.
02 Shoot to Thrill.wav:  track looks like CDDA with probability 100%.
03 Dirty Deeds Done Dirt Cheap.wav:  track looks like CDDA with probability 99%.
04 Back in Black.wav:  track looks like CDDA with probability 99%.
05 Who Made Who.wav:  track looks like CDDA with probability 100%.
06 Jailbreak.wav:  track looks like CDDA with probability 100%.
07 Hells Bells.wav:  track looks like CDDA with probability 100%.
